name: csi-sources-mcp-server
description: Calibratr Sourcing Intelligence — MCP server for free proof-of-work candidate sources (GitHub, Hacker News, arXiv, Hugging Face, Stack Overflow, Product Hunt, Semantic Scholar) with verbatim-URL guarantee, normalization, and deterministic scoring.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);"
